product_overview: AMAN ERP is a multi-tenant, Arabic-first enterprise resource planning platform tailored for Saudi compliance (ZATCA, GOSI, WPS) covering accounting, sales, purchases, inventory, HR, POS and more in a single integrated system.
core_goals: Provide a full-featured, Arabic (RTL) ERP covering finance, sales, purchasing, inventory, HR, manufacturing and POS.
Enforce Saudi regulatory compliance (ZATCA e-invoicing, GOSI, WPS, Zakat) out-of-the-box.
Support multi-tenant deployments with DB-per-company, secure JWT auth, role-based access control and API-first automation.
Deliver reliable financial integrity (auto journal entries, decimal-safe arithmetic, fiscal period locks) and performant POS flows.
Expose a stable API surface for automation, testing (TestSprite), and third-party integrations (ZATCA, banks, webhooks).

features.name: Authentication & Session Management
features.description: User authentication using form-based login, JWT token issuance, optional 2FA verification and session controls including rate limits and lockout.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded and body (username, password, company_code) -> Receive 200 with JSON { access_token, token_type:"bearer", user } -> POST /api/auth/2fa/verify with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and JSON { code } -> Receive 200 and session active
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials (wrong password) -> Receive 401 with error detail -> POST /api/auth/login repeated until rate limit exceeded -> Receive 429 with lockout message

features.name: Company & Access Control
features.description: List accessible companies for the authenticated user and manage roles/permissions within a company context (RBAC).
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with form-data -> Receive 200 with access_token -> GET /api/companies with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with list of companies and active company_id

GET /api/companies without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> POST /api/roles with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and JSON { name, permissions } (caller lacks admin permission) -> Receive 403 Forbidden
POST /api/roles with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and JSON { name:"accountant", permissions:["accounting.manage","reports.view"] } -> Receive 201 Created with role id

features.name: Finance Operations (Accounting & Treasury)
features.description: Query accounting entries and create treasury transactions with automatic journal entry generation and fiscal-period validation.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with form-data -> Receive 200 with access_token -> GET /api/finance/accounting/entries?from=2026-01-01&to=2026-01-31 with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with paginated journal entries

POST /api/finance/treasury/transactions with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and JSON { type:"transfer", amount:1000, from_account_id:123, to_account_id:456, date:"2026-03-01" } -> Receive 201 Created with transaction id and linked journal entry(s)

POST /api/finance/treasury/transactions with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and JSON for a date inside a closed fiscal period -> Receive 400 with error 'fiscal period locked' -> GET /api/finance/accounting/entries with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> to confirm no new entry created

features.name: Sales, Purchases & Inventory Operations
features.description: Operational ERP flows for sales orders, purchase orders and inventory validation across branches and warehouses.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with form-data -> Receive 200 with access_token -> GET /api/sales/orders?status=open with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with sales order list
POST /api/purchases/orders with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and JSON { supplier_id, lines:[{ product_id, qty, price }] } -> Receive 201 Created with purchase order id
POST /api/purchases/orders with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and JSON missing required fields (no lines or missing product_id) -> Receive 422 Unprocessable Entity with validation errors
GET /api/sales/orders with Authorization: Bearer <expired_token> -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Accounting Reports & Zakat Calculation
features.description: Generate financial reports (trial balance, P&L, balance sheet) and run Saudi-compliant Zakat calculations for a company fiscal period.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with form-data -> Receive 200 with access_token -> POST /api/accounting/zakat/calculate with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and JSON { company_id, fiscal_year:2025 } -> Receive 200 with zakat calculation { base, rate, amount }
GET /api/reports/accounting/trial-balance?as_of=2026-03-31 with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with trial balance report (PDF/JSON links)

POST /api/accounting/zakat/calculate with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and incomplete asset data -> Receive 422 with detail 'missing asset valuation' -> GET /api/reports/accounting/trial-balance with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> to retrieve supporting balances

features.name: Frontend SPA & Developer Docs
features.description: Serve the React single-page application shell and backend API documentation (Swagger) used by developers, QA and automated test runners.
user_flows: GET / with no Authorization -> Receive 200 with HTML application shell (SPA) -> Browser loads static assets and app initializes
GET /api/docs with no Authorization -> Receive 200 with Swagger/OpenAPI UI or JSON used by integrators and TestSprite
GET /api/docs while backend route unavailable (server error) -> Receive 502 Bad Gateway or 500 Internal Server Error

features.name: Authentication & Session Management
features.description: User login, JWT handling, and security-related session flows.

endpoints.description: Authenticate user credentials and issue access token.

depends_on: Company and user records in PostgreSQL

features.name: Company & Access Control
features.description: Manage companies, roles, and permission boundaries.
depends_on: Permission decorators and role policy checks

features.name: Finance Operations
features.description: Financial modules including accounting, treasury, taxes, and budgeting APIs.

endpoints.description: Retrieve journal entries and accounting records.

depends_on: Accounting chart setup and currency data

features.name: Sales, Purchases, and Inventory
features.description: Core ERP operational flows across sales, purchasing, and stock management.
depends_on: Product, warehouse, and party master data

features.name: Frontend SPA Modules
features.description: React single-page app for ERP modules, dashboards, and forms.

endpoints.description: Serve the ERP frontend application shell.
Access backend Swagger docs used by developers and QA.

known_limitations.issue: Root repository README is missing, reducing discoverability of canonical startup/testing guidance.
known_limitations.impact: Onboarding and test automation setup can be slower or inconsistent.

known_limitations.issue: API route inventory is broad and distributed across many router files, making complete endpoint coverage difficult without generated OpenAPI inspection.
known_limitations.impact: Automated test plans may miss less-used module paths unless explicitly targeted.
